quoteFirst: “She and friend Ernest went off in the car from the house at about
quoteLast: . At a quarter to four—just about the moment when the murders occurred—she was in a shop buying shoe-laces. That precludes any chance of her having used the car to get back to the Maze at the critical time. After that she paid a call on some friends and stayed with them until she came back home after six o’clock.”
title: Murder in the maze
author: Connington, J. J., 1880-1947

quoteLast: Mulholland entered the inquiry room, with the three men who had been detailed to carry out the sentence passed on the prisoner.
title: The informer
author: O'Flaherty, Liam, 1896-1984
